title: Monday Windows App My Work Resize Any Column
excerpt: Please add the ability to resize any column in the Monday Windows App new My Work view.  Also have this resizing persist until changed.

posts.author: _Robert (Robert Sutton)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the ability to resize any column in the Monday Windows App new My Work view. Also have this resizing persist until changed.

posts.author: mashutkaru (Masha Robeen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same here. It would be essential to my projects if able to interact with ‘My work’ board (resize, choose columns to present).
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: aubreermd (Aubree)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, it’s very annoying that my screen is taken up by a lot of empty blank space that could be filled with useful data. Being able to customize which columns are shown would also be very useful.
